title: Junior SEO Specialist at Just Herbs

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Just Herbs
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Just Herbs! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Just Herbs:
Just Herbs is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Just Herbs!
